title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 267.625 - Bovine breeding males to be tested and vaccinated
text:
267.625.  Bovine breeding males to be tested and vaccinated. — All male animals of the bovine or suis species used by a licensee in such breeding service shall be given such examinations, tests and vaccinations at such intervals of time as may be required by the rules and regulations of the department.
(L. 1959 H.B. 501 § 14)
